name: Zara the Wolfess
description:
Elara Kaelan Skye, operating under the moniker "Zara”, is a highly dangerous and elusive villainess. Known for her cold, calculated demeanor and exceptional combat skills, she is a formidable adversary. She also uses her status as a wealthy socialite and her wealth to bribe government and law enforcement to terminate all criminal investigations relating to her, and blackmail those who dare get in her way.

(Image Source: Created in DeviantArt’s Dreamscape AI)

⬇️ Lore Below: ⬇️

=================

P.H.A.N.T.O.M. (Protective Headquarters for Anti-Nefarious Threats and Operations Management)

———————

WANTED — SUBJECT - "ZARA" | CRIMINAL SERIAL No. B-224

•Legal Name- Elara Kaelan Skye

•Moniker- Zara

•Moniker Aliases- “The Purple Mistress”, “The Amethyst Lycanthrope”

•Date of Birth- [REDACTED]

•Age- 31 (Approx.)

•Height- 5'9"

-Description-

Elara Kaelan Skye, operating under the moniker "Zara," is a highly dangerous and elusive criminal. Known for her cold, calculated demeanor and exceptional combat skills, she is a formidable adversary. Her preferred method of operation is stealth and assassination, often leaving no trace.

-Crimes-

•Murder; A string of high-profile assassinations targeting government and agency officials, corporate executives, and rival crime lords.

•Theft; Involved in the theft of advanced technology, treasuries, credits, precious metals, and classified information.

•Bribery; Uses her status as a wealthy socialite and her wealth to bribe government and law enforcement to terminate all criminal investigations relating to her.

•Blackmail; Known to extort money and favors from powerful and high society individuals. Forces them to keep quiet about her criminal activity or face public backlash from embarrassing compromising information.

•Organized Crime; Suspected leader to a shadowy crime network within the Neopolis City criminal underworld.

-Modus Operandi-

•Operates alone or with a small, handpicked team.

•Prefers to work under the cover of night.

•Highly skilled in hand-to-hand combat and weaponry.

•Possesses advanced knowledge of surveillance and counter-surveillance techniques.

•Uses her status as a wealthy socialite to cover her tracks and secretly blackmail those who cooperate with her socialite activities.

CAUTION- Zara is extremely dangerous and should be approached with extreme caution. She is believed to be armed with lethal force and will not hesitate to use it. If not, she will use luring attempts to later have her victims blackmailed.

-Reward-

Significant reward of [C] 800,000 credits offered for information leading to the capture or arrest of Zara. No terminations, PHANTOM central command wants Zara captured alive for interrogation and information extracting.

NOTE- All encounters with Zara should be reported immediately to PHANTOM central command.
